name: Configure Exam Compliance and Feedback Messaging
description: Configure the 'Law 101 Final' exam on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin) to include a mandatory startup disclaimer and a custom quit confirmation warning. The disclaimer text must be: 'I affirm that I will not give or receive any unauthorized help on this exam, and that all work will be my own.' The quit confirmation warning must be: 'WARNING: You are about to exit the exam. This action cannot be undone. Ensure you have submitted your answers.'
